title: age-group — helper functions
description: Three published helpers for common age-group-flavoured lookups from any layer (controller, action, listener, blade template, artisan command). Age groups are NOT a request-scoped context axis (there is no `X-Age-Group-Id` header), so the helpers accept explicit arguments rather than reading from request state.

helpers.purpose: Returns the AgeGroup a hypothetical athlete with the given DOB (+ optional sport_key + optional organization scope) falls into on the given date (default today). Delegates to `AgeGroupResolver::resolveFor(...)`. Returns null when no group matches; throws AgeGroupResolveIndeterminate when multiple groups match + `age_group.resolution.indeterminate_strategy` = 'refuse'.
behaviours: Cheap — resolution is cached at `age:resolve:{tenant_id}:{dob}:{sport_key}:{organization_id}` for 5 minutes.
Sport-specific groups win over generic when both match + `prefer_sport_specific=true` (default).
Organization-scoped groups win over tenant-wide when both match.
helpers.usage_example:
$group = resolve_age_group('2013-05-14', 'football');
// → 'U12' (assuming athlete is currently 12 by football-federation cutoff)

helpers.purpose: Returns the current tenant's default AgeGroup for the given (sport_key, organization_id) tuple. Shortcut for `$tenant->defaultAgeGroup($sport_key, $organization_id)`.
behaviours: Returns null when no default is set for the tuple (Wave 3a: the seeded 'Adult' group is the default for the (tenant, null, null) tuple; other tuples may lack a default until the tenant creates + defaults a row).
Never queries the DB unless the cache is cold.
helpers.usage_example:
$default = default_age_group();
// → 'Adult' (the seeded default for most tenants)

helpers.purpose: Formats an AgeGroup's bounds + cutoff into a human-readable summary string. Locale-aware via the caller's active locale.
behaviours: Examples: 'Ages 10-11 (calendar year cutoff)', 'Ages 12-13 (academic year — Aug 1 cutoff)', 'Ages 3-5 (rolling from birthday)'.
Used in the AgeGroup picker + team-form summary chips + parent-facing enrollment previews.
Not `is_youth`-aware — that's a downstream rendering decision (banners + consent flows).

notes: Every helper here is a thin wrapper. Prefer container-injected services (`AgeGroupRepository`, `AgeGroupResolver`, `CutoffDateCalculator`) for anything more complex — helpers are a convenience for readable one-liners in view + controller code.
No `active_age_group()` helper — age groups are NOT a request-scoped context. Callers must pass the ULID or resolve via DOB explicitly.
No `is_youth_group()` helper — access `AgeGroup->is_youth` directly; it's a denormalised column.

examples.title: Preview an athlete's group during enrollment
Render the tenant's default group in a form
Show a group's bounds to a parent
